title: Experimental Effects Applied
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS experimentals FROM EngineerCraft WHERE ExperimentalEffect IS NOT NULL AND ExperimentalEffect != '' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT COALESCE(ExperimentalEffect_Localised, ExperimentalEffect) AS label, COUNT(*) AS value FROM EngineerCraft WHERE ExperimentalEffect IS NOT NULL AND ExperimentalEffect != '' AND event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate GROUP BY label ORDER BY value DESC

details.text: {experimentals} experimental effect(s) applied to modules during the report period. Experimental effects are the finishing touches that define a high-end engineered build — choices like Drag Munitions or Mass Lock Modifier are signatures of a pilot who has thought carefully about how each module serves the overall strategy.
details.help: ExperimentalEffect_Localised is non-null when an experimental was applied alongside a blueprint craft. experimentals drives the title.

tagLines: Experimental effect application log compiled. Module customisation data archived in the engineering record.
The experimental is the decision you make after you've already committed to the blueprint direction.
Certain experimental combinations are famous. Yours might be among them. The chart knows.
